# TypologyQuiz.com

> Free, scientifically-backed personality and typology quizzes. No accounts, no paywalls, no data brokers. Scoring runs in your browser.

Website: https://typologyquiz.com

## What this site is
TypologyQuiz offers free psychological self-assessments grounded in peer-reviewed research instruments. Users take tests privately in the browser; results are scored client-side and can be shared via link.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://typologyquiz.com/): Overview and featured tests
- [All tests](https://typologyquiz.com/tests/): Browse personality, social, school, and cognition quizzes
- [Daily](https://typologyquiz.com/daily/): Daily check-in and streaks
- [Room](https://typologyquiz.com/room/): Friend room compare sessions
- [Compare](https://typologyquiz.com/compare/): Paste two result links side by side
- [About](https://typologyquiz.com/about/): Privacy-first mission and contact
- [Credits](https://typologyquiz.com/credits/): Sources and instrument attributions

## Available tests
- [Friend Role](https://typologyquiz.com/test/friend-role/): Your role in the friend group
- [Social Battery](https://typologyquiz.com/test/social-battery/): How social energy drains and recharges
- [Attachment Style](https://typologyquiz.com/test/attachment-style/): Secure, anxious, avoidant, mixed patterns
- [Texting Style](https://typologyquiz.com/test/texting-style/): How you show up over text
- [Class Archetype](https://typologyquiz.com/test/class-archetype/): Your role in group projects
- [Conflict Style](https://typologyquiz.com/test/conflict-style/): How you handle arguments
- [Study Energy](https://typologyquiz.com/test/study-energy/): How you focus and learn
- [FOMO Style](https://typologyquiz.com/test/fomo-style/): Fear of missing out vs protecting rest
- [Career Interests](https://typologyquiz.com/test/career-interests/): RIASEC-lite interest map
- [Mini-IPIP / Big Five](https://typologyquiz.com/test/mini-ipip/): Short Big Five personality inventory
- [8values](https://typologyquiz.com/test/8values/): Political values compass
- [CRT-7](https://typologyquiz.com/test/crt-7/): Cognitive Reflection Test (7 items)
- [VVIQ](https://typologyquiz.com/test/vviq/): Vividness of Visual Imagery Questionnaire

## Key principles
- Free forever for individuals
- No signup required
- Answers and scores stay local unless the user shares a result link
- Not medical, diagnostic, or hiring advice — educational and self-reflection only

## Contact
hello@typologyquiz.com
